name: IDnow
description: German identity verification platform with video-based KYC, document verification, and eSigning APIs.

seo.title: IDnow — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: IDnow: German identity verification platform with video-based KYC, document verification, and eSigning APIs.

when_to_use: Video-based KYC for German BaFin-regulated bank accounts
eIDAS-qualified document verification for EU financial services
eSigning API for legally binding digital contract execution
Automated ID document check for insurance onboarding
Video KYC workflow for German fintech regulatory compliance

pros: Video-KYC accepted by German BaFin regulations
eSigning and doc verification in same platform
Strong footprint across DACH and EU banks
cons: Video-KYC is pricier and slower than auto flows
Less optimal for non-EU customer bases
Some customers report variable agent wait times
Heavier compliance stack than US peers need
review.verdict: Go-to video-KYC and eSign platform for German-regulated onboarding, less essential outside the EU.
review.best_for: German and EU banks needing BaFin-accepted video identification plus qualified e-signatures
review.not_for: Consumer apps wanting cheap automated selfie-based KYC with minimal customer friction

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
